rkm.project.golfgame

Class Line

  • java.lang.Object
    • rkm.project.golfgame.Line
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    Segment

    public class Line
extends java.lang.Object
    Line class calculated from 2 points
    Author:
    InesDt
